creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-01-11 11:14:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/m17n-im-config Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The program m17n-im-config provides a GUI for per-user configuration of
  input methods of the m17n library (devel/m17n-lib and textproc/m17n-contrib).
  
  The following methods are customisable at the moment: Unicode, Vietnamese,
  Malayalam, Tibetan, Thai, Japanese and Chinese.
  
  WWW: http://www.m17n.org
       http://www.m17n.org/common/im-config/index.html
  
  PR:             ports/127893
  Submitted by:   Nikola Lecic <nikola.lecic at anthesphoria.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1290    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/textproc/m17n-im-config/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/m17n-im-config/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/textproc/m17n-im-config/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/textproc/m17n-im-config/pkg-plist (new)
